title: METRONET and Transperth Logo for MTR
description:
Resource pack to change the MTR logo to Metronet

Also include Transperth Logo in version 2
body:
This resource pack replaces the MTR Mod logo to the Perth METRONET Logo which looks like this: ![METRONET Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d6a722bc4a3db1e5fe5f7293910b7225cc4de11.png)

Why would you want this? Perhaps you do not like the default MTR pink, or you're from Perth.
